summary: Decumulation Calculator (Pension Phase) Testing - Iteration 99. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: 6 tabs (Setup, Assets, Income, Results, Projections, Rules), 4 summary cards, pie charts, year-by-year projections table, Load Sample and Calculate buttons.

issues: Important Information modal appears on every page load - consider adding 'Don't show again' option or localStorage persistence (noted in previous iterations)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tabs, buttons, charts, and navigation working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for assets, liabilities, and super pensions during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decumulation Calculator fully functional. Backend implements Australian SMSF rules including minimum drawdown rates by age (4% under 65 to 14% at 95+), Transfer Balance Cap ($1.9M), Age Pension calculation with assets and income tests, deeming rates. Frontend has 6 tabs with comprehensive UI for pension phase planning.

features_verified.GET /api/decumulation/rules: PASS - Returns minimum_drawdown_rates, transfer_balance_cap ($1.9M), age_pension_rates, life_expectancy, pension_age (67)
features_verified.GET /api/decumulation/asset-assumptions: PASS - Returns return assumptions by asset type (cash, shares, property, etc.), entity_types, asset_types, liability_types
features_verified.GET /api/decumulation/demo/sample-calcul: PASS - Returns full sample calculation with calculation_id (DEC-{date}-{uuid}), summary, current_position, assets_by_type, assets_by_entity, income_analysis, drawdown_analysis, age_pension, longevity_analysis, projections
features_verified.POST /api/decumulation/calculate - basic: PASS - Accepts person, assets, liabilities, super_pensions, expenses and returns projections
features_verified.POST /api/decumulation/calculate - with: PASS - Correctly includes liabilities in net position calculation
features_verified.POST /api/decumulation/calculate - drawd: PASS - Supports minimum, percentage, and fixed_amount strategies
features_verified.POST /api/decumulation/calculate - age p: PASS - Correctly calculates age pension for those 67+ and excludes for under 67
features_verified.POST /api/decumulation/compare-strategie: PASS - Compares minimum, percentage, fixed_amount strategies with recommendation
features_verified.Validation - missing person: PASS - Returns 422 for missing person field
features_verified.Frontend - /decumulation-calculator page: PASS - Shows header, summary cards, 6 tabs
features_verified.Frontend - Summary cards: PASS - Total Assets, Super Pension, Liabilities, Net Position all displayed
features_verified.Frontend - Setup tab: PASS - Personal Details, Drawdown Strategy, Settings, Super Pensions sections
features_verified.Frontend - Assets tab: PASS - Assets and Liabilities sections with add/remove functionality
features_verified.Frontend - Income tab: PASS - Other Income Streams, Expenses sections, Calculate button
features_verified.Frontend - Results tab: PASS - Key metrics, Assets by Type pie chart, Assets by Entity pie chart, Longevity Analysis, Net Position Over Time chart
features_verified.Frontend - Projections tab: PASS - Year-by-Year Projections table with Age, Super, Other Assets, Liabilities, Net Position, Drawdown, Age Pension, Total Income, Expenses, +/- columns
features_verified.Frontend - Rules tab: PASS - Minimum Drawdown Rates table, Age Pension Thresholds (FY 2024-25), Deeming Rates, Key Rules
features_verified.Frontend - Load Sample button: PASS - Triggers sample calculation and shows results
features_verified.Frontend - Calculate button: PASS - Triggers calculation and redirects to Results tab
features_verified.Frontend - Navigation: PASS - Decumulation Calculator link in Calculators section (Personal Mode) with NEW badge

decumulation_calculator_summary.description: Comprehensive pension phase planning module for AdviceOS platform
backend_features: Minimum drawdown rates by age (4% under 65 to 14% at 95+)
Transfer Balance Cap ($1.9M as of July 2024)
Age Pension calculation with assets and income tests
frontend_features: 6 tabs: Setup, Assets, Income, Results, Projections, Rules
4 summary cards: Total Assets, Super Pension, Liabilities, Net Position
Personal Details with age slider, gender, homeowner status, relationship status
Drawdown Strategy selector with target percentage/amount options
Assets and Liabilities management with add/remove
Other Income Streams and Expenses tracking
Assets by Type and Assets by Entity pie charts
Longevity Analysis with life expectancy, funds duration, final net position
Year-by-Year Projections table with all financial metrics
Rules reference with minimum drawdown rates and age pension thresholds
